segments.text: Either player could take the lead at any moment!
segments.original_text: やはりいつラインが入れ替わってもおかしくない

segments.text: You could definitely call this a high-risk, high-reward situation!
segments.original_text: ハイリスクハイリターンな状況とも言えるでしょう

segments.text: That Wind God Fist is safe!

full_text: Either player could take the lead at any moment! You could definitely call this a high-risk, high-reward situation! Djiro with a nice nair! That Wind God Fist is safe!

corrections.original: ディジロン選手空営のうまく
